title: Has this community turned into a ghost town?
excerpt:
Has this community taken on the persona of a ghost town? 
My brain is playing the sound of The Good, The Bad, and The Ugly in its subconscious whenever I’m here…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has this community taken on the persona of a ghost town?

My brain is playing the sound of The Good, The Bad, and The Ugly in its subconscious whenever I’m here…

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @anon29275264

Apologies for the delay here!

The Community is still active! Here you can interact with our users, certified partners and members of our CX and Developer Success teams.
You can also find the newest conversations posted in the Community from our homepage here: monday Community Forum - A community for monday.com users

Let us know if you’re looking for something specific in the Community or if you have any other questions - we’d love to help

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
